---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, operator, or language addition
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / use case

<!-- What problem would this solve?  What are you trying to do that
is currently awkward or impossible? -->

## Proposed API or syntax

<!-- Stack effect, operator name, or syntactic form you have in mind.
A concrete example is much better than a description. -->

```trix
% example of the proposed feature in use
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What have you tried or considered in place of this?  Why does
the proposed approach fit better? -->

## Scope and cost

<!-- Rough sense of the implementation footprint: new operators,
new type, new VM field, etc.  If you're unsure, say so. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to prior art (PostScript, Forth, other languages), related
issues, or anything else that motivates the request. -->
